svg.text: Prompt Layout + Workflow Hierarchy + Data Flow + Token Budget
Generated 2026-03-01 | All token estimates are approximate
Communication style, tool calling, code edit
- Roadmap Digest in phase-spec (skip roadmap re-read)
LAYER 1: Three-Layer Workflow Hierarchy (on-demand, triggered by /slash-command or internal dispatch)
1.3 Load API Surface Index (hub + layer files)
Spec exists? -> locate next incomplete Task
+ Demo Checklist + Test count + Perf sanity
S8: Phase ID -> Filename Mapping Rules
Phase type dispatch: standard / cooldown / spike
S1.6: Write Phase Spec + Roadmap Digest
S5: Task Completion -> return to L1
LAYER 2: Spec & Template Files (document store — read on demand)
Created on first phase completion per layer
Load: O(dependent layers) not O(total phases)
Task table, Demo plan, Test summary
AI docs for GitHub repos (Slang, Dawn, VMA)
LAYER 4: Output Artifacts (written by agent during execution)
